# Elli Session Targets
*Auto-generated — do not edit manually*
*Updated: 2026-04-02T00:43:19.790Z*

• Play a rhyming game where we say "sit, sat, hit, hat, bit, bat" back and forth really fast—see if you can spot the pattern

• Give her two instructions in a row naturally: "touch the red circle, then clap twice"—watch what she remembers to do

• Tell her a short sentence and ask her to repeat it back—start with 4 words, then try longer ones with more details

• When she's talking, ask her to tell you what's happening in a picture using words like "is running" or "was sleeping"

• Have her make up sentences using a word you give her—like "make a sentence with the word 'cat'"
